introSection:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Old Chicago in Bolingbrook, Illinois, USA.

When Toboggan operated is not known. It was added to the park after the complex was built. It is not known where the Toboggan went after leaving Old Chicago.

sections.title: External links
sections.content:
* This page contains a map of Old Chicago when it opened. The Toboggan cannot be seen.
 * This page mentions Toboggan and contains a photograph, proving the existence of Toboggan.
 * Negative-G also has a photograph of the Toboggan.

fullText:
Toboggan was a steel roller coaster located at Old Chicago in Bolingbrook, Illinois, USA.

When Toboggan operated is not known. It was added to the park after the complex was built. It is not known where the Toboggan went after leaving Old Chicago.


 * This page contains a map of Old Chicago when it opened. The Toboggan cannot be seen.
 * This page mentions Toboggan and contains a photograph, proving the existence of Toboggan.
 * Negative-G also has a photograph of the Toboggan.
